subject: UX Polish Pass Complete: First-Play Map Entry Restored and Test Drift Resolved
task: Report completion of Franklin's requested first-play navigation map fix and stale test assertion update.
outcome: Franklin, the two structural gaps from Yuli's conditional sign-off are addressed. `MenuMap.tsx` now renders a visible `Disc` start node whenever `disc.firstPlayAction` exists, so the authored entry doorway appears in both the mini map and full map instead of being dropped as an orphan edge. I also corrected the stale preview-copy assertion in `SceneEditor.test.tsx` and added a focused regression test for the first-play node.

changes.detail: Added a renderable `disc` node, shifted VMGM menu placement when first-play exists, and preserved `firstPlay` / `endAction` edge semantics in the graph.
Added regression coverage that asserts the start node and its target menu render together in the mini map.
Updated the honest-preview banner assertion to the current `Compile Preview — DVD output simulation` copy.

follow_up: Nicholas can continue the Honest Preview clarity pass independently; this change clears the map-entry and stale-test blockers from Yuli's review path.
